### REQUEST ###

POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1

```














{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "tests/test_integration.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Integration test: run netprof analyze on fixtures and assert outputs.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nimport subprocess\r\nimport sys\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_netprof_fixtures_generate(out_dir: Path) -> None:\r\n    subprocess.run(\r\n        [sys.executable, \"-m\", \"netprof.cli.main\", \"fixtures\", \"generate\", \"--output\", str(out_dir)],\r\n        check=True,\r\n        capture_output=True,\r\n        cwd=Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_netprof_analyze(pcap_path: Path, out_dir: Path) -> None:\r\n    subprocess.run(\r\n        [sys.executable, \"-m\", \"netprof.cli.main\", \"analyze\", str(pcap_path), \"--out\", str(out_dir)],\r\n        check=True,\r\n        capture_output=True,\r\n        cwd=Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED(\r\n    not Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.joinpath(\"netprof\").exists(),\r\n    reason=\"netprof package not installed\",\r\n)\r\ndef test_analyze_fixtures_integration(tmp_path: Path):\r\n    \"\"\"Generate fixtures, run analyze, assert summary and transactions counts.\"\"\"\r\n    fixtures_dir = tmp_path / \"fixtures\"\r\n    out_dir = tmp_path / \"out\"\r\n    _run_netprof_fixtures_generate(fixtures_dir)\r\n    http1_pcap = fixtures_dir / \"http1_keepalive.pcap\"\r\n    http2_pcap = fixtures_dir / \"http2_minimal.pcap\"\r\n    assert http1_pcap.exists(), \"http1_keepalive.pcap should exist\"\r\n    assert http2_pcap.exists(), \"http2_minimal.pcap should exist\"\r\n    _run_netprof_analyze(fixtures_dir, out_dir)\r\n    summary_path = out_dir / \"summary.json\"\r\n    assert summary_path.exists(), f\"summary.json not found in {out_dir}\"\r\n    with open(summary_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as REDACTED        summary = json.load(f)\r\n    assert summary[\"total_flows\"] == 2, f\"expected 2 flows, got {summary['total_flows']}; summary={summary}\"\r\n    assert summary[\"total_transactions\"] >= 2, f\"expected >=2 transactions, got {summary['total_transactions']}\"\r\n    txns_path = out_dir / \"transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    assert txns_path.exists()\r\n    lines = [ln for ln in open(txns_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") if ln.strip()]\r\n    assert len(lines) >= 2\r\n    txn1 = json.loads(lines[0])\r\n    assert \"txn_id\" in txn1\r\n    assert \"flow_id\" in txn1\r\n    assert \"path\" in txn1 or \"method\" in txn1\r\n    flows_path = out_dir / \"flows.jsonl\"\r\n    assert flows_path.exists()\r\n    flow_lines = [ln for ln in open(flows_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") if ln.strip()]\r\n    assert len(flow_lines) == 2\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:22:07 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED

%7B%221%3ALEN%22%3A%22REDACTED%22%2C%222%3ALEN%22%3A%22tests%2Ftest_integration.py%22%2C%223%3ALEN%22%3A%22%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22Integration%2Btest%3A%2Brun%2Bnetprof%2Banalyze%2Bon%2Bfixtures%2Band%2Bassert%2Boutputs.%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cnimport%2Bjson%5Cr%5Cnimport%2Bsubprocess%5Cr%5Cnimport%2Bsys%5Cr%5Cnfrom%2Bpathlib%2Bimport%2BPath%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cnimport%2Bpytest%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cndef%2B_run_netprof_fixtures_generate%28out_dir%3A%2BPath%29%2B-%5Cu003e%2BNone%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsubprocess.run%28%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%5Bsys.executable%2C%2B%5C%22-m%5C%22%2C%2B%5C%22netprof.cli.main%5C%22%2C%2B%5C%22fixtures%5C%22%2C%2B%5C%22generate%5C%22%2C%2B%5C%22--output%5C%22%2C%2Bstr%28out_dir%29%5D%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcheck%3DTrue%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcapture_output%3DTrue%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcwd%3DPath%28__file__%29.resolve%28%29.parent.parent%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%29%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cndef%2B_run_netprof_analyze%28pcap_path%3A%2BPath%2C%2Bout_dir%3A%2BPath%29%2B-%5Cu003e%2BNone%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsubprocess.run%28%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%5Bsys.executable%2C%2B%5C%22-m%5C%22%2C%2B%5C%22netprof.cli.main%5C%22%2C%2B%5C%22analyze%5C%22%2C%2Bstr%28pcap_path%29%2C%2B%5C%22--out%5C%22%2C%2Bstr%28out_dir%29%5D%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcheck%3DTrue%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcapture_output%3DTrue%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcwd%3DPath%28__file__%29.resolve%28%29.parent.parent%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%29%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5CREDACTED%28%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bnot%2BPath%28__file__%29.resolve%28%29.parent.parent.joinpath%28%5C%22netprof%5C%22%29.exists%28%29%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breason%3D%5C%22netprof%2Bpackage%2Bnot%2Binstalled%5C%22%2C%5Cr%5Cn%29%5Cr%5Cndef%2Btest_analyze_fixtures_integration%28tmp_path%3A%2BPath%29%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22Generate%2Bfixtures%2C%2Brun%2Banalyze%2C%2Bassert%2Bsummary%2Band%2Btransactions%2Bcounts.%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%3D%2Btmp_path%2B%2F%2B%5C%22fixtures%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bout_dir%2B%3D%2Btmp_path%2B%2F%2B%5C%22out%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B_run_netprof_fixtures_generate%28fixtures_dir%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhttp1_pcap%2B%3D%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%2F%2B%5C%22http1_keepalive.pcap%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhttp2_pcap%2B%3D%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%2F%2B%5C%22http2_minimal.pcap%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bhttp1_pcap.exists%28%29%2C%2B%5C%22http1_keepalive.pcap%2Bshould%2Bexist%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bhttp2_pcap.exists%28%29%2C%2B%5C%22http2_minimal.pcap%2Bshould%2Bexist%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B_run_netprof_analyze%28fixtures_dir%2C%2Bout_dir%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsummary_path%2B%3D%2Bout_dir%2B%2F%2B%5C%22summary.json%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary_path.exists%28%29%2C%2Bf%5C%22summary.json%2Bnot%2Bfound%2Bin%2B%7Bout_dir%7D%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bwith%2Bopen%28summary_path%2C%2Bencoding%3D%5C%22utf-8%5C%22%29%2Bas%2BREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsummary%2B%3D%2Bjson.load%28f%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary%5B%5C%22total_flows%5C%22%5D%2B%3D%3D%2B2%2C%2Bf%5C%22expected%2B2%2Bflows%2C%2Bgot%2B%7Bsummary%5B%27total_flows%27%5D%7D%3B%2Bsummary%3D%7Bsummary%7D%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary%5B%5C%22total_transactions%5C%22%5D%2B%5Cu003e%3D%2B2%2C%2Bf%5C%22expected%2B%5Cu003e%3D2%2Btransactions%2C%2Bgot%2B%7Bsummary%5B%27total_transactions%27%5D%7D%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btxns_path%2B%3D%2Bout_dir%2B%2F%2B%5C%22transactions.jsonl%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Btxns_path.exists%28%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Blines%2B%3D%2B%5Bln%2Bfor%2Bln%2Bin%2Bopen%28txns_path%2C%2Bencoding%3D%5C%22utf-8%5C%22%29%2Bif%2Bln.strip%28%29%5D%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Blen%28lines%29%2B%5Cu003e%3D%2B2%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btxn1%2B%3D%2Bjson.loads%28lines%5B0%5D%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B%5C%22txn_id%5C%22%2Bin%2Btxn1%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B%5C%22flow_id%5C%22%2Bin%2Btxn1%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B%5C%22path%5C%22%2Bin%2Btxn1%2Bor%2B%5C%22method%5C%22%2Bin%2Btxn1%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bflows_path%2B%3D%2Bout_dir%2B%2F%2B%5C%22flows.jsonl%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bflows_path.exists%28%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bflow_lines%2B%3D%2B%5Bln%2Bfor%2Bln%2Bin%2Bopen%28flows_path%2C%2Bencoding%3D%5C%22utf-8%5C%22%29%2Bif%2Bln.strip%28%29%5D%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Blen%28flow_lines%29%2B%3D%3D%2B2%5Cr%5Cn%22%2C%224%3AVARINT%22%3A2%7D
